original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: British Association of Dermatologists guidelines for the management of hidradenitis suppurativa (acne inversa) 2018
original_registry_entry.version: BAD guideline 2018, published in British Journal of Dermatology 2019; DOI 10.1111/bjd.17537
original_registry_entry.jurisdiction: United Kingdom; international evidence requiring UAE adaptation
original_registry_entry.population: People with suspected or established hidradenitis suppurativa; pediatric and pregnancy-specific decisions require additional evidence.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Primary and specialist dermatology recognition, baseline assessment, severity documentation, and longitudinal review.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for documenting recurrent painful inflammatory lesions in characteristic flexural sites and clinician-assessed baseline stage, severity, pain, and quality-of-life impact. It does not diagnose hidradenitis, calculate a score, or generate treatment or referral.

exact_sections.heading: Definition, clinical presentation, and disease course
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting recurrent painful inflammatory lesions, nodules, abscesses, draining sinuses or scarring, typical flexural distribution, age at onset, and interval course without inferring the diagnosis.

exact_sections.heading: Audit points and baseline disease assessment
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-entered baseline disease stage, severity, pain, and dermatology quality-of-life impact; no score is calculated automatically.

title: British Association of Dermatologists guidelines for the management of hidradenitis suppurativa (acne inversa) 2018
jurisdiction: United Kingdom; international evidence requiring UAE adaptation
population: People with suspected or established hidradenitis suppurativa; pediatric and pregnancy-specific decisions require additional evidence.
intended_setting: Primary and specialist dermatology recognition, baseline assessment, severity documentation, and longitudinal review.
access_limitations: Official host returned a challenge or shell page rather than guideline content.
